title: Chum
description: Chum adds general improvements to the Minecraft fishing mechanics, along with some new fishing-related features
body:
# THIS MOD REQUIRES FRAMEWORK TO FUNCTION

### This mod adds general improvements to the Minecraft fishing mechanics, along with some new fishing-related features

___

## Main Features
- Fishing minigame
- Worms that spawn during rain, which you can pick up
- New parrot behaviour which makes them attracted to the "Can of Worms" block
- New fishing related enchantments
- 2 new paintings
- And its all configurable!
- (more is yet to come)

___

![Catching a fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f582c1184e6667fff7206ba077e1eea6075e48_0.webp)

![Some worms popping up in the rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd62228aea771212ab5fd894e2c0ce10e391d033_0.webp)

### Note: This is in early development so it may have bugs, and is currently not fully optimized for the best performance!

___

Current incompatibilities:
- Aquaculture 2
